creator: wollman@khavrinen.lcs.mit.edu
text:
I was in desperate need of some way to generate pie charts.
	The only thing that looked like it would do the trick was
	this Perl module.  Note that it requires an upgrade of p5-GD
	before it will operate.

How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/math; more */pkg/DESCR
